_publications._publicationTitle: Combined Inhibition of SHP2 and MEK Is Effective in Models of NF1-Deficient Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors

details: JH-2-031 MPNST cell line tested in vitro (CCK-8, western blot) for combined MEK + SHP2 inhibition; harbors a co-occurring oncogenic PIK3CA Q546K mutation and did not show additive benefit from MEK + SHP2 co-inhibition, illustrating a resistance mechanism outside the RAS/SHP2 axis
